<a id="class-panel"></a>

# Panel

**Inherits:** [Control](class_control.md#class-control) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A GUI control that displays a [StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox).

## Description

**Panel** is a GUI control that displays a [StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox). See also [PanelContainer](class_panelcontainer.md#class-panelcontainer).
